name: compute_org_hierarchy
payload:
-- Oracle hierarchical query: flatten org chart using CONNECT BY
SELECT
  EMPLOYEE_ID,
  FIRST_NAME || ' ' || LAST_NAME AS EMPLOYEE_NAME,
  MANAGER_ID,
  LEVEL AS DEPTH,
  SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(LAST_NAME, '/') AS HIERARCHY_PATH,
  CONNECT_BY_ROOT LAST_NAME AS TOP_MANAGER,
  CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS IS_LEAF,
  DECODE(LEVEL, 1, 'CEO', 2, 'VP', 3, 'Director', 4, 'Manager', 'Staff') AS TITLE_LEVEL,
  NVL(DEPARTMENT_NAME, 'Unassigned') AS DEPARTMENT
FROM HR_EMPLOYEES
START WITH MANAGER_ID IS NULL
CONNECT BY PRIOR EMPLOYEE_ID = MANAGER_ID
ORDER SIBLINGS BY LAST_NAME
